Ravenscale Shoulderpads  
 

Lore Item
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 10
STR: +5
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Ravenscale Shoulderpads
Lore Item
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 10
STR: +5
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:430
Submitted By:iventheassassin
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-31 10:07:28
Page Updated:Wed Jan 14th, 2026

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 400pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Steamfont Mountains
NPC Name
Renux Herkanor - TRoK - Epic 1.0

Updated December 12th, 2022

It's very nostalgic to come back and read posts about people not believing these exist because they're too good.

It really puts things in perspective.

QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2002 at 8:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362291596
8 posts
Since this item is so difficult to get, is there a shoulder piece which is the same color as the ravenscale and wearable by a barbarian rogue? Something cheaper or easier to attain than the ravenscale would be helpful.
▲ Page top
Renux... please
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 3:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Ravenscale is so passe now. I still love the stuff, but it's no good to anyone about level 40 anymore, other than a few pieces, this is one,the mask, and maybe a few others.

They moved some of the drops to the front of CT, which is a good idea, but leaving the rest of it on Renux is a bad idea. She's a tough mob, and these pieces aren't really any good to the people that can actually kill her.
▲ Page top
Raven Scale
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2002 at 9:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255244649
View User Forum
36 posts
First of all Most of the Raven Scale items other that that which drops of the lvl 51 mob in Steamfont/Renux now drops in the Feerot, not in CT. Some long camping if you want to Raven Scale and not pay for it. It drops off of the Named Lizards in the Feerot around the zone to CT. Also drops of the Silverflank Apes at the Entrance to CT. Of course Raven Scale is weet looking however other than a couple pieces of Raven Scale you can get much better stats on other items. So if your just wanting to look wicked cool, then get something other than Raven Scale. I personally use Rygorr bracers, Rygorr helm, Rygorr Gloves, Treeweave, Fbss, Mithril arms, and legs, Dww boots, Tatterd Mantle, and Raven Scale Cloak... Anyways thats my 2cp.

Vanderath Dragula
lvl 43 Rogue of the Ebon Mask

If you feel that purse is lighter than usual then you have passed my way in the middle of the night.


▲ Page top
Not all drops in CT

Well, it drops off of a 50+ mob that is tough to get to spawn and kill...and it doesn't have bad stats either.
▲ Page top
They are real
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2000 at 2:59 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591751689873
1 post
These Drop of Renux in Steamfont Mountains. She is part of the rouge Particle weapon quest. She also has a chance of dropping RS belt, mask, choker and cloak

#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 8:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ARRRGGGGG GURGLGURGLGURGL IT'S ROGUE NOT ROUGE!!!!!! (rouge is a color in french(red)) the only real rouge class is sombody running around in bloodstained armor...

# Oct 04 2001 at 1:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249781606
Sage
374 posts
Bah! Every good rogue hates being referred to as a color. Bad spelling gets annoying; I just try to make the world a little less imperfect.

You better put your work clothes on cuz you ain't got your own kingdom...
▲ Page top
RE: They are real
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 7:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763215931
15 posts
Damn Skippy!
You say rouge in the game i will give you **** but i know it is just a typo. You say rouge in a post about an item that is Rogue only and therefore only of real interest to Rogues, then you're being Damn rude! If you are a Rogue and are calling yourself rouge you should turn in your backstabber and go play a ranger or a druid or something
Beric Dondarrion
Level 54 Rogue
Torvonnilous

QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2001 at 10:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756870557
View User Forum
37 posts
Just got these last night after killing Renux in the Steamfont Mountains. She spawns after handing Yendar the Tattered Parchment and Book of Souls.

She also dropped the Ravenscale Neckguard and, as always, the Trochilc's Skean.

(Heya, Kelce! Good to see you, brother Rogue!)
▲ Page top
RE: hrm
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 4:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757568151
10 posts
Ronait, I myself wear a pair of these. They're very respectable shoulder items up to the mid 50s. Currently the only upgrade I see to these are either the drop off Dracoliche (Shawl of Protection) or the NToV drops.

P.S. The Ravenscale Cloak, Belt and Mask are the only non-CT Ravenscale drops. It's off Renux, a forced spawn in Steamfont.
▲ Page top
